title: Customers Active In Last 30 Days
description: Find customers who have placed at least one order in the last 30 days from '2024-03-01'. Return distinct customer ids.
sql_solution: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders WHERE date >= DATE('2024-03-01', '-30 day');
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    orders.filter(to_date(col("date")) >= date_sub(lit("2024-03-01").cast("date"), 30))
    .select("customer_id")
    .distinct()
)
